name: Deploy to VPS

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to VPS
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.VPS_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.VPS_USER }}
          key: ${{ secrets.VPS_KEY }}
          script: |
            cd ~/Ecommerce
            git pull origin master
            docker-compose down
            docker-compose up -d
